channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-05 10:31 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Yesterday, I had the privilege of speaking at the@a16zAmerican Dynamism Summit with the builders, op...
item.description: Yesterday, I had the privilege of speaking at the@a16zAmerican Dynamism Summit with the builders, operators, and investors helping shape the next era of exploration. NASA has a clear mandate under President Trump’s national space policy: Return American astronauts to the Moon by the end of 2028, build an enduring presence there, and ensure American leadership in the most important strategic domain. Achieving that requires focus and disciplined execution. In the weeks ahead, the Artemis II crew will travel around the Moon. It is the next step toward returning humans to the lunar surface and building a lasting presence there. To reach that goal, we’ve recently made some changes to the Artemis program: Increasing launch cadence, standardizing hardware, and adding missions that allow us to test systems, reduce risk, and build confidence before landing. This is the same approach that carried the United States from Mercury to Gemini to Apollo. In the 1960s we launched often, learned from every mission, and improved with each step forward. That is how you build real capability in deep space. Yesterday, I also announced NASA Force, a new initiative with@USOPMto bring exceptional engineering and technical talent into NASA and help rebuild the core competencies that make missions like this possible. We want to open the search far and wide to attract the best of the best and incentivize them to leverage their skills to maintain American superiority in space. NASA changed the world in 1969 by concentrating the nation’s best talent on the hardest problems imaginable. We are doing it again.

item.title: @elonmusk: Damon Johnson just set someone on fire in NY while on parole. 131 prior arrests.
item.description: Damon Johnson just set someone on fire in NY while on parole. 131 prior arrests.

item.title: @elonmusk: Fact check and ask questions about any post just by tapping the Grok logo in the upper left
item.description: Fact check and ask questions about any post just by tapping the Grok logo in the upper left

item.title: @elonmusk: Try the 𝕏 app widget and never miss a trending moment again Get the real-time news right on your hom...
item.description: Try the 𝕏 app widget and never miss a trending moment again Get the real-time news right on your home screen without even opening the app. The moment something big breaks, you will see it first Just press and hold the 𝕏 app icon → tap "Widget" → done

item.title: @elonmusk: Get your friends to join 𝕏!
item.description: Get your friends to join 𝕏!

item.title: @elonmusk: For the past few months, we’ve been quietly building a standalone X Chat app for iOS. Today we’re op...
item.description: For the past few months, we’ve been quietly building a standalone X Chat app for iOS. Today we’re opening it to the first 1,000 users on TestFlight. Use it. Break it. We want your feedback. Screenshot → ✓ → “Share Beta Feedback…”testflight.apple.com/join/2d…

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok is only going to get even better with time. Never forget that fact. 😎🔥
item.description: Grok is only going to get even better with time. Never forget that fact. 😎🔥

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Web now has a Toggle for Grok 4.20 Beta When it's on, Expert mode uses Grok 4.20
item.description: Grok Web now has a Toggle for Grok 4.20 Beta When it's on, Expert mode uses Grok 4.20

item.title: @elonmusk: i’m seeing people i follow who i haven’t seen in awhile on the timeline maybe the algorithm is heali...
item.description: i’m seeing people i follow who i haven’t seen in awhile on the timeline maybe the algorithm is healing 😭

item.title: @elonmusk: Expanding to the stars avoids risk of a mouse utopian behavioral sink
item.description: Expanding to the stars avoids risk of a mouse utopian behavioral sink
